programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Forgotten But Fatal
programme.desc: Florida college student Lindsey Meyer and Michigan E.M.T Kevin Nesbit both come down with a painful sore throat. What seems like a symptom of the common cold, soon spirals into a life or death situation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: The sense of security in Waseca, Minnesota shatters when 12-year-old Cally Jo Larson is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Back to the Bush
programme.desc: The Wolfpack arrives on their new property in the most remote frontier of the lower 48, but the long winter in the region wreaks havoc on their first attempts to tame the mountain.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Breaking Ground
programme.desc: The Browns begin an ambitious barn build, the key to Billy's grand vision. Noah returns reuniting the entire wolfpack for the first time since Alaska.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Head Above Water
programme.desc: Disaster strikes as floods plague the region, and the Browns must balance the fate of their new community with the success of their homestead.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Call to Duty
programme.desc: Noah invents an ingenious device to rid their homesite of moles. Billy gives daughter Rain major responsibility as barn construction goes full bore at the ranch.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bird and the Bees
programme.desc: Ami prepares for a critical doctor check-up, but Billy has concerns about progress on the homestead while they're away. A rogue bear destroys Bam's new beehives forcing the kids to rebuild the hive and save the bees before it's too late.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Big Build
programme.desc: All hands are on deck as the Wolf Pack fights personal projects, braces for a looming wildfire and gets one of their own hitched all while racing to finish the first major build on their new ranch.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Will to Survive
programme.desc: Recently pushed off their land, the Brown family travels deep into the wilds of Alaska to build an off-grid cabin and begin anew. Temperatures are falling rapidly and illness is being passed around but the Wolf Pack must persist if they want to survive.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: A confrontation on the Browns property shuts down production and forces them to make a big decision.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Secrets of the Hunt
programme.desc: Hunting is more than a sport in the wilderness, it's a means of survival. Over decades in the Alaskan bush, the Browns have developed their own unique tricks and secrets to hunt like only the Wolfpack can.

programme.title: Raised Hunting: Anything
programme.desc: Warren tries to build the best hunting app ever while trying to fill his Iowa bow tag.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds
programme.desc: A racer modifies his drag boat-almost costing his life; two storm chasers are trapped by a tornado; passengers flee an exploding plane; a military plane crashes and one of the most infamous bridges disintegrates.

programme.title: What Destroyed the Hindenburg?
programme.desc: Engineers will test leading theories to discover what really destroyed the Hindenburg.

programme.title: The Tidewater Boats Elite Redfish Series: Frogg Toggs Kick Off Classic, Grand Isle, LA
programme.desc: The season begins with the frogg toggs Kick Off Classic. The E.R.S. hits the shores of Grand Isle with the first of 2; Atlas All Star Team Opens.

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom: Brad Peterson
programme.desc: Brad Peterson joined the U.S. Coast Guard where he saved many lives on the water. Now he's a nurse at the Minnesota VA.

programme.title: The RVers: Learning to Drive a Huge RV (Part 2)
programme.desc: Mobile internet 101.

programme.title: The Given Right: Hunting with Family and Friends in the Deep South
programme.desc: Kenneth goes hunting in Mississippi with his wife and two daughters. With the help of his friend George Walker, Kenneth and his daughter pursue a whitetail in the same stand that he and his father did in years past.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Back to the Woods
programme.desc: When Tickle returns to the outlaw side, even Tim can't resist the call of the backwoods. Mark and Digger rediscover a lost recipe from a legend. Mike finds the ultimate secret mountain still site, if only he can build a way to access it.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: The Cabin in the Quarry
programme.desc: The builders float down the Ohio River and land in Paducah, Kentucky, where they try to save a little cabin in a big quarry. Alex makes a chair, Johnny drives a dump truck, Sherman makes a quilt, and Mark helps build a barnwood table.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Adapt and Overcome in Hamlin, WV
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders never give up, and despite some rough going early on, this one turns out to be worth all the extra effort. Mark goes on a cross-country search for replacement logs while the team pulls the cabin apart without sacrificing logs.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: High-End Timber Frame Kitchen In Brevard, Nc
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders build a timber frame kitchen that will be the centerpiece of a high-end mountain retreat in Brevard, NC. Later, Mark and the guys visit some of the architect's other spectacular log homes.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Foldable Cabin
programme.desc: Mark brings one of his biggest ideas to life, a foldable steel cabin. The crew takes the cabin on its maiden voyage and unfolds it for the first time in the boneyard, then they add a timber frame facade and a complete barnwood interior to finish it off.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Pieces of the Past
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and the guys salvage every last good log they can from an old double-pen barn in Pennsylvania so the logs can be reused to build a guesthouse in upstate New York.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Caught in a Gypsy Love Triangle
programme.desc: A gypsy bride-to-be finds herself caught in a love triangle with two potential suitors and a bridesmaid from hell. A young Romney teen turns her back on tradition to follow her dreams of becoming the first gypsy supermodel.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Wedded to Disaster
programme.desc: Gorger Alyssa is ready to marry Romney man, Lacy, but their relationship is put to the test when Lacy's mom refuses to accept her soon to be daughter in law.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: The Greek Goddess and the Giant Gown
programme.desc: A Greek Gypsy bride-to-be sets out to make history in the biggest, blinged-out wedding dress ever made. Later, it's a clash amongst the generations when a gypsy teen's sweet 16 party is derailed by her over-bearing traditional grandmother.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Double Wedding from Hell
programme.desc: Gypsy BFFs Amber and Stefanie are planning a double wedding, but a jealous cousin will stop at nothing to hijack the big day and steal back Amber's fiancé! Gypsy wrestler Priscilla's birthday may turn into a cage match if her father shows up uninvited.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: What Am I Worth to You?
programme.desc: Anny is frustrated with Robert's promised shopping spree. Tania and Syngin disagree on their future plans. Anna feels Mursel is asking too much from her. Emily goes into labour, but there are complications. Then, meet new couple Mike and Natalie.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Pillow Talk: What Am I Worth to You?
programme.desc: Anny is frustrated with Robert's promised shopping spree. Tania and Syngin disagree on their future plans. Anna feels Mursel is asking too much from her. Emily goes into labor, but there are complications. Then, meet new couple Mike and Natalie.

programme.title: Unpolished: Meet the Martones
programme.desc: The Martones are a loud, fun-loving Italian family from Long Island. Sisters Lexi, a talented nail artist, and Bria, a hair colourist/makeup artist, run Salon Martone while juggling family dynamics, over the top clients, and their own relationships.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: What Am I Worth to You?

programme.desc: Anny is frustrated with Robert's promised shopping spree. Tania and Syngin disagree on their future plans. Anna feels Mursel is asking too much from her. Emily goes into labor, but there are complications. Then, meet new couple Mike and Natalie.

programme.title: Unpolished: Meet the Martones
programme.desc: The Martones are a loud, fun-loving Italian family from Long Island. Sisters Lexi, a talented nail artist, and Bria, a hair colourist/makeup artist, run Salon Martone while juggling family dynamics, over the top clients, and their own relationships.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: This Is Showtime
programme.desc: It's a star studded premiere as Jenna and Val from Dancing with the Stars waltz into Kleinfeld to find her dream dress. WWE Hall of Famer Mick Foley steps out of the ring to help his friend Heather find a last minute dress after hers is ruined.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Bedazzled Truck Driver
programme.desc: Feisty Rebecca has lost 90 pounds and won't let her mom keep her from her dream dress. Plus-size Cassidy has her heart set on one particular Hayley Paige gown. Plus, a glam wedding proves you're never too old to be a princess.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Randy Just Showed You the Door!
programme.desc: Twins Marlo and Margo are back, but this time, Marlo is the bride. Karma can be cruel as Margo's sass is unleashed and family drama further escalates when a major secret is revealed. Bride Val needs a gown for her icy wedding atop an Alaskan glacier.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Launching a New Marriage
programme.desc: Dress shopping just got hot with 'Iron Chef's' Cat Cora and her fiancée, Nicole. Rain needs a dress that will fit inside one of Coney Island's scariest rides. George helps Stephanie and Adel get into shape for their big day.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: There's a Shark in the Salon!
programme.desc: It's sink or swim for Randy when Shark Tank's Barbara Corcoran comes to Kleinfeld. Bride Bridgette needs a dress she can run in. Her wedding ceremony is taking place during a half marathon in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Don't Show the Goodies
programme.desc: Stephanie has a big budget and wants a show-stopper dress for her second marriage. Courtney Burson is back and she may have finally made up her mind about a dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Morticia Addams in a Good Way
programme.desc: Designer Hayley Paige drops in to help a bride who wants to look like a creepy fairy to match her skull centrepieces on her wedding day. With more than 150 discarded dresses, Rachael is a bride with a penchant for pickiness.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The WAG
programme.desc: Bride Lyndzie believes she was royalty in a past life and this WAG intends to have a royal wedding in this life. Bride Ashley wants a dress that's not too revealing so her mom won't have a heart attack.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: 24 Hours With Theresa
programme.desc: For an entire day, Theresa doesn't shut off spirit, which leads to 24 hours of non-stop readings.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Larry Returns
programme.desc: Theresa reads a young girl whose parents believe she may also possess the gift of communicating with those who have passed. It's an emotional family reunion when Theresa's ex-husband Larry returns to Long Island for Victoria's engagement party.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Keeping the Faith
programme.desc: Theresa conducts a group reading for people of different faiths to show how everyone is connected by Spirit. A pastor, a rabbi, a practicing Buddhist and members of the Hindu faith receive meaningful readings.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Clearing the List
programme.desc: Reaching out to fans who've been on her mailing list for a decade, Theresa does a series of big group readings to clear her list. A man grieves as he wasn't able to save his dad, and two moms are reconnected to their children who took their own lives.

programme.title: Full House: Luck Be a Lady
programme.desc: The family travels to Lake Tahoe, where Joey and the girls get lucky at card playing.

programme.title: Full House: Luck Be a Lady
programme.desc: Jesse and Rebecca propose to say 'adieu' to single life by saying 'I do' to each other.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pet or Pests/ Komputer Overload
programme.desc: SpongeBob adopts a stray worm, which soon gives birth to a litter of baby worms.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sweet and Sour Squidward/ The Googly Artiste
programme.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward so he can get the Krabby Patty formula. When an art critic deems Patrick a true artiste for his rocks-with-googly-eyes creations, everyone in Bikini Bottom clamours for a Patrick original.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Goo Goo Gas/ Le Big Switch
programme.desc: Plankton creates a gas that turns everyone at the Krusty Krab into babies. After being enrolled in a cooks exchange program, SpongeBob switches places with a snooty French chef from a high-end restaurant.

programme.title: 44 Cats: Farmer Cats for a Day/ Bongo on Stage
programme.desc: Corney helps Granny and the Buffycats find ingredients at the farm. The white orangutan is set to perform at the circus.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Rewriting History
programme.desc: The Rangers are brainwashed to think that Blaze and Roxy are part of their team.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Fun-Sized Friends/ Grandmum's the Word
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick exchange tiny living versions of themselves. Plankton tells his Grandma that he owns the Krusty Krab, but must keep the lie going when she comes to visit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob in RandomLand/ SpongeBob's Bad Habit
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Squidward take a delivery to a dreaded town where the laws of logic no longer apply. SpongeBob can't stop biting his nails, but he can't figure out why.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mind the Gap/ Dirty Bubble Returns
programme.desc: SpongeBob has a change in demeanor after Squidward closes the gap in his teeth.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Exchange Student/ Crystal Ball Birthday
programme.desc: When an exchange student comes to visit, he tells a scary story that make the chipmunks think Dave is in danger. Annie and Amber offer to plan Brittany's birthday party, pitting her against Jeanette and Eleanor in the process.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures: 3, 2, 1/ Shirley Keeper
programme.desc: It's the day of the big rocket launch, and the entire city has Mars launch fever.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spot Returns/ The Checkup
programme.desc: When his pet amoeba, Spot, has puppies, Plankton decides to use them in another of his nefarious plots. Mr. Krabs is too scared to get his physical, but if he doesn't pass, the Krusty Krab will be shut down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: License to Milkshake/ Squid Baby
programme.desc: SpongeBob learns his milkshake license has expired, and is forced to go back to the milkshake academy.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Cave Dwelling Sponge/ The Clam Whisperer
programme.desc: When a prehistoric Sponge is unfrozen, he causes chaos all over town, and only SpongeBob can communicate with him. A flock of clams descend on Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chatterbox Gary/ Don't Feed the Clowns
programme.desc: Gary has a pet translation collar, and he's talking up a storm. When a small clown gets left behind by the circus, SpongeBob takes the hapless harlequin under his wing.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Handemonium/ Breakin'
programme.desc: SpongeBob takes his first break.

programme.title: The Loud House: One of the Boys/ A Tattler's Tale
programme.desc: Lincoln wishes he had ten brothers instead of ten sisters, and Lisa gives him a glimpse into that reality.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Loudest Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Wanting to spend Thanksgiving together, Lori and Bobby try to bring their families together for the first time.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Godzillicle
programme.desc: Examining instances of huge killer icicles, strange blue lights looming above storm clouds, weather systems created by mushrooms and a weird green haze enveloping Moscow.

programme.title: Strangest Weather on Earth: Noisy Nature
programme.desc: In this episode, the weather creates a strange symphony. Light sabre sounds mysteriously resonate from icy lakes, rocks ring like bells and deadly multiple twisters roar and rage across the earth.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Split Second Survival
programme.desc: Whether we are documenting a devastating tornado or intentionally putting ourselves in danger, Mother Nature always keeps us on our toes.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Wild Weather Control
programme.desc: Winter that's one for the record books, a bus that tries to outrun rare Romanian tornado and a shelf cloud that is the stuff of nightmares when wild weather is unleashed.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: Come Rain or Cyclone
programme.desc: Water is a necessity of life but in certain forms, it can threaten it. From surviving a monster typhoon in India, completing a record-breaking free dive to a horrifying plunge into a sinkhole, we are always at the mercy of water.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: All Around Us
programme.desc: A courier truck rolls over; a vicious storm puts Abrams driver Mark in the middle of a crash zone on the 401; the crew dives for cover during an icy airbag job.

programme.title: Ice Pilots NWT: Meltdown
programme.desc: A flight falls through the cracks after the McBryans attend a wild family wedding, and an irate Joe pulls captain Justin from the Turkey test flights to do the job. Justin's task is to move an impatient Brit and his possessions to a northern outpost.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Nervous Wreck
programme.desc: Al and Gord gamble on a job that's closed the highway and pushed both green wreckers to the limits. In Alberta, Jamie's crew battles a whiteout to reach a chain reaction wreck. In B.C., a wrecker is called in to help solve an underwater mystery.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Rear View
programme.desc: As Jamie reaches a difficult crossroads, he looks back over four seasons, revisiting his most challenging wrecks and recoveries. Familiar faces from past and present explain what drives them to this dangerous world.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Fork in the Road

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Snowmobile Desperation

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Buried by a Blizzard

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Buried in the Snow

programme.title: SOS: How to Survive: Stranded in the Desert

programme.desc: Arline's hoard has reached such immense proportions that her husband has been sleeping in his car each night to recover from surgery. Carolyn's family will press charges if she doesn't return stolen items.

programme.title: Hoarders: Jackie and Richard
programme.desc: Jackie has filled her 4,000 square foot San Francisco hillside home with $1 million of teddy bears. Richard previously agreed to his family's pleas for an emergency cleanup of his home.

programme.title: Hoarders: Ellen and Gloria
programme.desc: The tragic loss of Ellen's husband in the line of duty triggered hoarding through kleptomania. Gloria's family is on the verge of calling the sheriff.

programme.title: Hoarders: Charles and Alvin
programme.desc: Charles' house is filled with thousands of paintings he has done and his family worries he may hurt himself. Alvin's hoarding is so out of control that he's been forced to put his TV and food cooler in his bathroom and spend his time there.

programme.title: Hoarders: Joni and Millie
programme.desc: Child Protective Services had to take Joni's granddaughter away from her because of her hoarding. Also, Millie has already tried to clean up her act, only to relapse and start hoarding again. Daughter Chelsea has one last ultimatum for her.

programme.title: Hoarders: Manuel and Carla
programme.desc: Manual was living in his hoarded house with his four children, but they were removed by Child Protective Services. Carla has hoarded out three homes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Like a Boss

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pick a Loser
programme.desc: Find out which Joker was arrested in a foreign country and why the Jokers filmed at Madison Square Park often in the early days. Plus, learn the camera crew's motto.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: Find out whose familiar face showed up in the waiting room, how many dogs Sal had to babysit, and which Joker came up with the punishment that left Joe feeling numb.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bellydancer
programme.desc: Learn about Murr and Sal's favourite sandwich, which Joker is certified in CPR and what gift Murr received when the show first started.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cat Lady
programme.desc: At auditions, Michael wows directors with costume changes but cracks when he sings. Plus, things get sticky when he demos flying post-its. Then, Michael's co-worker's jaw drops when a shape-shifting tenant returns while they clean house.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Moving Dragon
programme.desc: While working at a pool store, Michael flies on a kickboard. Then, at a pet store, he breeds hamsters from pellets. He also stuns his helper on moving day with a fiery statue.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Might Be Trippin'
programme.desc: Find out which trick nearly wounded a delivery man, what illusion is difficult for even skilled magicians to pull off and why fans speculated the show was connected to the illuminati.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Simon Soft
programme.desc: Michael turns iced tea into a tea candle and later, at a pet store, he reveals that caterpillars have wicks. Plus, at a warehouse, Michael stumps his assistant when he proves that big tricks come in shrink-wrapped packages.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Whippit
programme.desc: In an ice cream shop, Michael whips up a mind-boggling app; at party store, he spills the tea on a self-brewing decoration; and at a farm, Michael's helper looks like he saw a ghost after a run-in with a spirited scarecrow.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Field of Screams
programme.desc: How the creepy voice changer was made for Devil Voices. The penguin tips Murr learned as a zookeeper.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The parts of Out of Remote Control that annoyed people more than any challenge to date. Why the crew was emotionally scarred after Debate and Switch.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Drum and Drummer

programme.desc: When it comes to Thanksgiving, nobody can compete with grandma's signature recipes, so Clash of the Grandmas star Norma Zager joins Bobby Deen to lend her expertise to the remaining eight bakers.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Thanksgiving Joy
programme.desc: In the pre-heat, the remaining seven bakers must combine all of their favorite Thanksgiving desserts into one by creating elegant trifles. The bakers have to produce Thanksgiving imposter cupcakes.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Hearth and Home
programme.desc: Nothing says the holidays like a crisp fire on a snowy day, so in the pre-heat, the remaining six bakers are tested on how well they can make a dessert featuring toasted marshmallows.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Sweet Surprises
programme.desc: For the pre-heat, the bakers must whip up a dessert inspired by an ugly Christmas sweater. Keeping with the surprise theme, in the main heat the bakers create edible gift boxes.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Christmas Morning
programme.desc: The remaining four bakers recreate their childhood memories by making edible dessert stockings for the pre-heat. Then, they take their designs to new heights in the main heat by building colorful cream puff Christmas trees.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Live From the North Pole
programme.desc: Instead of milk and cookies for old St. Nick, the final three must make delicious snacks for North Pole characters other than Santa. To top off the whole season, the bakers are tasked with baking and decorating a North Pole-inspired cake.

programme.title: Martina's Table: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: With her entire family home for Thanksgiving, country music superstar Martina McBride shares some of her favourite recipes inspired by her Kansas roots. Her holiday menu includes sausage, cherry and cornbread stuffing and candied pecans.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Almost Home For Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Bobby waits while Sophie heads home for after-Thanksgiving brunch. He prepares chocolate pumpkin swirl bread with marmalade and reinvents the holiday dinner with waffle cornbread stuffing sandwiches with turkey.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Thanksgiving Melting Pot
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites some of his favourite chefs to the ranch to share some Turkey Day dishes that speak to their personal heritage. G. Garvin brings Georgia flavour north of the Mason-Dixon Line.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Thanksgiving, SoCal-Style
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli loves the ease of living and cooking in Southern California, and the Thanksgiving holiday is no exception. This year, she's treating her guests to a luscious, festive, Cali-style celebration.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ask Me Anything: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is tackling a fun, Thanksgiving-themed Q and A, where the answers include an awesome Thanksgiving breakfast casserole and pumpkin tiramisu, her favorite holiday dessert. She also serves up Nan's Cranberry Sauce.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Thanksgiving Shortcuts
programme.desc: Ree is sneaking a few store-bought shortcuts into her make-ahead Thanksgiving feast. First is her epic make ahead Thanksgiving turkey, which is cooked and portioned in advance. She makes doctored up dressing and gussied up gravy to go alongside it.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: One-stop Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Ree prepares a frontier-style Thanksgiving starting with pumpkin gingersnap cheesecake with salted caramel sauce. Her spread includes four sides: broccoli wild rice casserole, no-knead clover leaf rolls, green beans and tomatoes, and soul sweet taters.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is hosting Thanksgiving on the farm with Nick, her mom and a variety of family friends. She's making her foolproof sweet-and-smoky turkey, crunchy pretzel stuffing and a delicious side dish of charred creamed corn.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Reinventing Fall Foods
programme.desc: In an effort to shake up traditional takes on fall foods, Valerie Bertinelli treats her guests, Chef Ludo Lefebvre, his wife, Krissy, and their 8-year-old twins, to a super special day-after brunch filled with seasonal treats for a long holiday weekend.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like a Pro: Italian
programme.desc: Ina Garten is sharing all her secrets and pro tips for Italian dishes. She starts with a fabulous two-fer, tomato eggplant soup, and the leftovers become baked pasta with tomatoes and eggplant.

programme.title: Giada's Holiday Handbook: Family and Friends Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Giada hosts a festive Thanksgiving for family and friends. The guests enjoy a menu of braised turkey braciole, bacon stuffing with radicchio and chestnuts, Brussel sprouts agrodolce and parmesan apple pie.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Thanksgiving Live
programme.desc: From dry turkey to lumpy gravy, the hosts offer advice on how to pull off the biggest meal of the year: Thanksgiving. They share their expertise and answer viewers' calls for help. Plus, they reveal time-saving tips and demonstrate recipes.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship: Plenty of Gratitude
programme.desc: For the pre-heat, the eight bakers work in teams to make four different kinds of pies. In the main heat, the bakers embrace the stuffed feeling after the Thanksgiving meal by making stuffed cakes featuring seasonal ingredients.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Big Flappy Bastards
programme.desc: Charlie gives Jake the cold shoulder after he lures seagulls into the house. Meanwhile, Alan gets a surprise from Judith when he offers to fix her sprinklers.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Go East on Sunset Until You Reach the Gates of Hell
programme.desc: Charlie takes Alan out on the town after Alan's fun-filled father/son weekend plans backfire. Too many drinks soon lead Charlie and Alan to confront their mother.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: If I Can't Write My Chocolate Song, I'm Going to Take a Nap
programme.desc: When Charlie's longtime cleaning lady quits, Alan is sent to lure her back. Meanwhile, Alan asks Charlie to get Jake ready for Judith.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Last Thing You Want Is to Wind Up With a Hump
programme.desc: After a wild night in Vegas, Charlie reluctantly attends Jake's soccer game where he discovers the hidden dating potentials.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Did You Check With the Captain of the Flying Monkeys?
programme.desc: Charlie rethinks his ways after he, Alan and Jake must cheer up a dejected Evelyn. Meanwhile, Charlie teaches Jake some lessons about screening calls from women.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: If They Do Go Either Way They're Usually Fake
programme.desc: Judith is upset when she learns that Jake has seen a tattoo on a surfer's nude behind. Alan grows suspicious when Judith and the surfer become good friends. Charlie teaches Jake about the difference between real breasts and implants.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Twenty-Five Little Pre-Pubers Without a Snootful
programme.desc: When Alan and Judith argue during a rehearsal for Jake's play, Charlie is stuck handling a roomful of fourth graders by himself. Charlie then uses his jingle-writing experience to craft the play -- with an interesting outcome.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Phase One, Complete
programme.desc: Charlie is uncomfortable when his latest romantic conquest befriends both Jake and Evelyn. Alan gets too competitive when playing a board game with Rose.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Alan Harper, Frontier Chiropractor
programme.desc: Alan reluctantly agrees to a makeover after seeing Judith's new look. Meanwhile, Evelyn stays at Charlie's house to bond with Jake.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Sarah Like Puny Alan
programme.desc: In order to secure a date, Charlie volunteers a flu-ridden Alan to escort the woman's sister and tries desperately to speed up the recovery. But when Charlie is the one who gets ill before the date, their roles get reversed.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Can't Afford Hyenas
programme.desc: Charlie discovers that his accountant is inept and his debts are all overdue. While Alan convinces Charlie to cut his spending, Charlie teaches Jake about sports gambling.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Round One to the Hot Crazy Chick
programme.desc: Charlie is intrigued when he and Alan find a sexy, but seemingly crazy, woman hitting a car with a baseball bat.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: That Was Saliva, Alan
programme.desc: Frankie is forced to explain why she is in hiding with her eight-year-old daughter, Joanie. While both brothers are interested, only one of them manages to win her heart. Meanwhile, Jake is disinterested in Joanie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Remember the Coatroom, I Just Don't Remember You
programme.desc: Judith's sister, Liz, hits on Alan at Jake's party despite having a history with Charlie. Meanwhile, Evelyn celebrates Jake's birthday in her own way.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Hey, I Can Pee Outside in the Dark
programme.desc: Jake continuously plays 'Smoke on the Water' on his guitar and has developed a grumpy attitude. Alan tries a father/son chat, Charlie offers a jam session and Berta thinks Jake is just constipated.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: No Sniffing, No Wowing
programme.desc: Alan takes Charlie to meet with his divorce attorney, Laura, after Judith expresses concern that Charlie is a bad influence on Jake. Laura is open to Charlie's other relationships, but takes advantage of her request that he be available at any time.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: My Doctor Has a Cow Puppet
programme.desc: Alan finally succumbs to Judith's demand that he take Jake to therapy and realizes he has been sleepwalking. After Evelyn tells Charlie that Alan used to sleepwalk as a child, Charlie believes he has a solution.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Can You Feel My Finger?
programme.desc: After Charlie has yet another pregnancy scare, Alan suggests he get a vasectomy. Charlie's doctor recommends freezing some sperm in case he changes his mind about having children, but things don't go quite as planned.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Back Off, Mary Poppins
programme.desc: When Alan learns that Charlie belongs to an exclusive male support group, he begs to join.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Enjoy Those Garlic Balls
programme.desc: Alan attempts to push Judith's new relationship with Dr. Melnick to the next level.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Bag Full of Jawea
programme.desc: Charlie attempts to keep Jake from being suspended from school by wooing his teacher.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Go Get Mommy's Bra
programme.desc: Charlie agrees to trade cars with his mother for a day and ends up with major regrets.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Guess Who's Not Coming to Dinner
programme.desc: Christine cringes at her mother's constant disapproval but when she goes home for Thanksgiving, she's able to thwart one of her criticisms when she discovers a secret they have in common.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: I Love Woo, I Hate You
programme.desc: Fearful that he might propose to her, Barb insists that Christine join her on a date with Dave. Meanwhile, Richard realizes he must woo new Christine in order to get her back.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Old Christine Meets Young Frankenstein
programme.desc: When Christine finds out that Ritchie has been bullying other kids, she decides to set a good example and apologize to the woman she used to terrorize at school.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: A Whale of a Tale
programme.desc: When Christine decides to tell her therapist she's in love with him, his response is not what she expected.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Truth or Dare
programme.desc: When handsome Mr. Harris comes back into Christine's life, she must choose between him or her new love Max.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: A Family Unfair
programme.desc: Christine becomes envious as Richard and New Christine plan for their new baby and decides to ask Richard for his help so she can have one too.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Break-In
programme.desc: Terrified by a burglary, the girls explore means to protect themselves, including a dog.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche and the Younger Man
programme.desc: Blanche dates her young aerobics instructor; Rose is overprotective of her mother.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Heart Attack
programme.desc: Sophia suffers an apparent heart attack and the girls nervously await the paramedics.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Stan's Return
programme.desc: Dorothy's ex-husband, Stan shows up to settle a piece of land they bought on their honeymoon. This leads to Dorothy and Stan spending the night together. Meanwhile, Rose and Blanche plan a vacation that Sophia is not invited on.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Custody Battle
programme.desc: Dorothy's sister, Gloria, comes to Miami for a visit and asks Sophia to come live with her in California. Meanwhile, Blanche is furious when Rose is cast as Lady Macbeth in a local play, and not her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Triple Play
programme.desc: Miles introduces Rose to his daughter Caroline; Blanche rents a Mercedes to attract men.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Nice and Easy
programme.desc: Blanche's visiting niece is a chip right off the old block when she dates a different man all night every night. Dorothy does battle with a mouse living in the house.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Operation
programme.desc: Dorothy is hesitant about having foot surgery just as she was scheduled to tap dance with Blanche and Rose at a dance recital.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Second Motherhood
programme.desc: Blanche is romanced by a wealthy suitor who she learns has several small children. This fact dampens his proposal of marriage. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Rose go to bat with the bathroom plumbing.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Job Hunting
programme.desc: When Rose loses her job at the grief center, she begins searching for other sources of work. Meanwhile, Blanche tries to lose a few pounds and Dorothy is excited when a man she once had a crush on asks her out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blind Ambitions
programme.desc: Rose's sister, Lily, can't accept the fact that now that she's blind, she needs help.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy
programme.desc: Blanche's father, Big Daddy, comes to Miami for a visit, with an announcement; he's sold the family plantation and is setting out to become a country singer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: End of the Curse
programme.desc: Blanche is mortified after taking a pregnancy test which indicates she's pregnant. Then after visiting her doctor, she learns the truth, she's beginning menopause.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Take Him, He's Mine
programme.desc: Dorothy dumps a depressed Stan on Blanche so that she can go out with a naval officer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: It's a Miserable Life
programme.desc: The girls petition to save an old oak tree on the property of a hateful woman.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Isn't it Romantic
programme.desc: Dorothy's old friend, Jean comes to Miami for a visit and Dorothy decides not to tell Blanche and Rose that Jean is a lesbian. Then, after spending time with Rose, Jean begins to fall for her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy's Little Lady
programme.desc: Blanche's dad announces he's remarrying; Rose and Dorothy enter a song-writing contest.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Family Affair
programme.desc: A generational clash occurs when Dorothy's son Michael and Rose's daughter Bridget visit.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Vacation
programme.desc: The girls' dream vacation in the Caribbean turns out to be far from what was advertised in the brochure. While the girls are away, Sophia romances the gardener.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Big Day for Baby Rhino
programme.desc: Terri helps prepare the zoo's new baby rhino to receive a lifesaving vaccine. Robert is on a rescue mission to save two black swans in very bad shape. Bindi tries to determine if a cranky wombat named Poa might be pregnant.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Crocodile Love Story
programme.desc: It's moving day for Acco, the zoo's biggest crocodile. All goes to plan until his mate Cassie goes into hiding as the team races to reunite the bonded pair in their new enclosure. The rescue unit fights to save a flying fox entangled in barbed wire.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Oscar the Grouchy Frogmouth
programme.desc: Terri returns to her hometown in Oregon to help Brady, a cougar in need of a vital health check. At the zoo, Robert is on a mission to rescue Oscar, a small bird with a big attitude, and Bindi bathes an echidna with bad skin allergies.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Extra Bites: Swimming With Steve
programme.desc: Bindi swims alongside whale sharks, assisting with research efforts on the world's latest and least understood fish. Robert work to save an echidna that's tightly trapped under a fridge. Terri joins a closeup exam on a grizzly.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Robert Trains a Dragon
programme.desc: Robert and Indah, a Komodo dragon, participate in an exciting research experiment. Terri tries to save a koala joey with a zero percent chance of survival. Bindi friends a childhood favourite spot- Oregon Coast Aquarium.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Never Too Late
programme.desc: Lizzy tries to track down the owner of a dog tied up outside the rescue. An older couple comes looking for their first dog, but their choice requires some special temperament testing. And, when a dog develops allergies, Mariah looks for a natural cure.

programme.desc: A member of Amanda's TV crew wants to adopt a Frenchie who lived her entire life in a puppy mill. Cupid, a lab mix puppy, needs daily physical therapy for a brain disorder, and a pittie from Amanda's past needs emergency surgery.

programme.desc: Chicago Bull's star Jimmy Butler calls Wayde and Brett to build him an old school Boombox aquarium that lights up AND plays music. But a tricky entryway throws a wrench in their plans. Oakland Raiders' Donald Penn is in serious need of a custom insert.

programme.title: Tanked!: Wyclef's Tank is Ready or Not?

programme.title: Tanked!: Alyssa's Charmed Tank

programme.title: Tanked!: Tracy Morgan's Giant Shark Tank Under Construction
programme.desc: Tracy Morgan has the biggest idea of all. Tracy wants to be able to swim with his massive 6 ft sharks, so he wants the guys to tank his entire pool house. Meanwhile, a local car dealership needs a new tank in their showroom to make a big splash.

programme.title: Tanked!: Tracy Morgan's Giant Shark Tank Revealed
programme.desc: Tracy Morgan is still waiting for his shark tank. The pressure is on Wayde and Brett to convert his entire poolhouse into a massive 14,000 gallon aquarium. Winter is approaching and extra care is taken while transporting Tracy's beloved sharks.

programme.desc: A team of Wardens deploy on a multi-county night operation to stop spotlighters and road hunters. Texas Game Wardens check teal hunters on opening weekend. A dead deer found with an arrow still in it leads Game Wardens to a poacher.

programme.title: Property Brothers: A Little Bit of Home

programme.title: Property Brothers: Designing Memories

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Binion's Hotel and Casino

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Wolf Creek Inn
programme.desc: The crew travels to Oregon to investigate the mysterious Wolf Creek Inn, a historic building riddled with aggressive negative energy, apparitions and a vampire-like creature. During the lockdown, Aaron experiences a dramatic psychological breakdown.

programme.desc: Zak and the crew trek a treacherous cliffside trail to investigate a former mining town haunted by the lost souls of its former residents.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: It's Job Security
programme.desc: Task force patrols the streets at night incognito to track down unsuspecting thieves.

programme.title: Betrayed: Prescription for Murder
programme.desc: After Marilyn Reza, a church-going mother of two is found dead in her home, investigators turn their attention to the members of her local church. However, a secret confession at her funeral brings the true murderer to light.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Flowers in the Lake
programme.desc: Leesa Nascimento was murdered on July 6, 2010 by being shot in the head. A recently sacked co-worker, Lorenza Sam is traced after evidence was found that tied him to the murder and he was arrested. He was sentenced to Life in Prison without parole.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Target on Her Back
programme.desc: 24-year-old grocery store worker, Caroline Nosal befriends her introvert colleague Christopher O'Kroley. Chris is eager to make friends with Caroline possibly too eager. Caroline complains to store management about Chris things don't turn out as planned.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Screaming Terror
programme.desc: Alice Hufnagle was raped and murdered on November 22. 2002. After following numerous leads and dead-ends, Police find the vital clues that lead them to Jeffery Vample, Alice's co-worker from a local Pharmacy.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Memory and Mystery
programme.desc: Twelve years after a brutal attack that left her almost dead, a woman undergoes hypnosis to recover memories of the man who assailed her. New DNA technology uses a single drop of blood to paint a portrait of a suspect. And police close in on an arrest.

programme.desc: A night of partying by fraternity brothers ends with a knock on the door and gunfire. One student is dead, three are wounded, and a freshman freely admits he was the shooter. He claims it was self-defence. But others say he was looking for revenge.

programme.title: Highway to Hell: Murder in the Fast Lane
programme.desc: A househunting trip along the Ohio Turnpike in Spring 2005 for Dr. Gulam Moonda and his wife, Donna, ends in disaster when a gunman approaches on the side of the highway.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Left to Die
programme.desc: Toddler Cooper Harris dies after being left in a hot car. His father says it was an accident. Authorities say it was murder. What secrets was the father keeping? The grieving mother who stunned a courtroom speaks out about what happened to her baby boy.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: The Pastor, His Wife, Their Son, and His Mistress
programme.desc: Detectives found Pauletta Burleson murdered outside her home, which led to the discovery of a love triangle.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Before Her Eyes
programme.desc: A teenage couple out on a date are ambushed by a gun wielding madman. The lone survivor shares their harrowing account of what happened that fateful night.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Life Halted
programme.desc: When a young woman is savagely murdered in her own home, police and her family must find the clue hidden inside the blood-stained crime scene that will lead them to her killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Cloud Of Darkness
programme.desc: A college student disappears in broad daylight after an afternoon of sunbathing at a busy lake. The mystery deepens when her wallet is found along with the personal items of the victim of another violent crime.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: There's Something About Mary Lynn
programme.desc: A single mom is stalked by her ex-boyfriend's son for 22 years.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Apocalypse Now
programme.desc: 41-year-old single mother Patty is excited about a new chapter in her life when she begins dating one of her customers, Vietnam veteran Dale. But when Dale becomes violent on their first date, Patty is quickly sent into a desperate struggle for survival.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: A landscaper that has an obsession for his client won't take no for an answer.

programme.title: Diabolical: Lying for Love
programme.desc: After a rocky first marriage, Tim Koile has a new bride and a fresh lease on life. But when temptress Cathy Cousin moves next door, the married woman wraps the devoted father around her finger, and has him satisfy her every whim no matter how diabolical.

programme.title: Diabolical: Someone's Lying
programme.desc: On April 17, 2015, a Virginia hunter stumbles upon a grisly discovery in the woods: a woman with an execution style gun shot wound to the back of her head. As detectives begin their investigation, they uncover a twisted web of lies and crimes.

programme.title: Diabolical: A Life of Lies
programme.desc: Prichard AL is normally a quiet town but when the body of Re'Mano Campbell, a loving father, is found slain in his house the community grows apprehensive. And it'll take the cunning wit of local investigators to unravel the mystery of his murder.

programme.title: Diabolical: Control Freak
programme.desc: Donna Scrivo adult son Ramsay in days, and she's worried. She alerts the local police, but days pass with no sign of him anywhere. Then a grisly discovery of a severed human head and body parts along a rural highway reveals a act of shocking violence.

programme.title: The Last Don
programme.desc: Joe Massino, the 'Last Don', crushes anyone who goes against the mafia code of omerta. Loyalty to his family, and obedience to their code of silence, is everything. But when the Feds take Massino down, Massino takes everyone down with him.

programme.title: The Mafia Kingpin
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and the the model for running crime business.

programme.title: The Mafia's Black Sheep
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor the mob can't risk the fallout.

programme.title: Meyer Lansky and the Crime Syndicate
programme.desc: The story of Meyer Lansky, an associate of Lucky Luciano who was linked to criminal financial operations, but the FBI struggled to pin anything on him, or find his riches.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: John Gotti
programme.desc: The story of ambitious American mobster John Gotti, who became the boss of the Gambino family by ordering the death of the group's former head. He earned the nickname `Teflon Don' after three acquittals.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Lucky Luciano
programme.desc: The story of crime boss Charlie 'Lucky' Luciano, who used his Mafia connections to help the US government during the Second World War in return for his parole.

programme.title: Sam Giancana: Mafia vs. CIA
programme.desc: We reveal the secrets of the Mafia's most notorious members, beginning with Sam Giancana, who was associated with the Kennedys, Frank Sinatra, and the CIA.

programme.title: El Chapo: Caught!
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera aka El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the US marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Revolution
programme.desc: A look at how Russia sealed themselves behind an Iron Curtain, a move that spawned the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Peace and War
programme.desc: By the mid 1970s, the Cold War has remained a fact of life for decades. But 30 years into the war, and the doctrine of mutually assured destruction doesn't feel like a roadmap to peace. It's an arms race, a propaganda and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Paranoia
programme.desc: As the propaganda war and the arms race rage on, the 1950's becomes the decade of paranoia. The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the world descends further in chaos.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Rise of the Superpowers
programme.desc: For four decades ago, two global superpowers faced off, threatening to annihilate one another with the push of a button. It is an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War, Hot War
programme.desc: A look at the crucial events of the 1960s: U.S. troops in Vietnam, the USSR's warheads in Cuba and the moon landing.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War II
programme.desc: By the end of the 70's, war between East and West has been raging for decades. Countless proxy wars have proven how destructive the Cold War can be. It's an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times a deadly game.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Former First National Bank
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs take on the former first National Bank in Gastonia, NC. Key items salvaged include elevator parts and chicken wire windows. At the shop, Robert builds a bar out of a boat salvaged from Smith Mountain Lake.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Bowman House
programme.desc: The crew salvages an early 1800s farmhouse in Mt. Jackson, VA.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Rising Sun Ranch
programme.desc: The Dawgs tackle a ranch house in Alderson, WV. Key items salvaged include stained glass and corbels. In the shop, Mike reuses timber to build a beam table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Apple Barn
programme.desc: The team heads to Winchester, VA, to salvage an abandoned orchard barn but they must pick through years of trash and treasures before they begin.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Christiansburg House
programme.desc: The team travels down the road to Christiansburg to salvage an old home. They get some good meat and potatoes from the house, including the mantles, banisters and all the gingerbread trim. Also, Mike and Tay build a couch that can fit a Whiteside.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Teacherage
programme.desc: The team head to Henderson, NC, to salvage parts from an old home that used to house young female teachers. They salvage an attic ladder, doors, archways, and columns as well as the home's fire escape.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Geyser Gulch
programme.desc: The Dawgs salvage the amusement park attraction, Geyser Gulch, at Silver Dollar City in Branson, MO. Key items include a water tower, air pressure guns, and a blue slide. While at the shop, Mike builds a hostess stand for a local restaurant.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items in Norfolk and Petersburg into Repurposed Goods.
programme.desc: The crew pays homage to their old red truck by turning it into a bench.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Tully Choice Cabin
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs save steps and chimney rocks from a 1765 log cabin at Smith Mountain Lake. Gracie takes the team to a local glassblowing artist to make pieces for a chandelier. Robert and Ted also pick through a barn.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Nelson House
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage crew saves pieces of a house in Mt. Jackson, VA. Their main focus is on the clay-fired roof and on the oversized cornice bracket.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: The Young Guns' Dollar Deal vs. The Snows' Writer's Retreat
programme.desc: The Snows get a steal on a small 300 sq. ft. building, but discover that it was used as an office for a riding arena and has no kitchen. They turn it into a cozy writer's retreat with a compact kitchen and completely renovated bathroom.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: The Young Guns Duplex Debacle Brings Down the House
programme.desc: Cody and Suzi decide to share duties redesigning a duplex when he takes one side and she takes on the other. All is going well until they find extensive rot and termite damage on Cody's side.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: The Young Guns' Over-the-Top Barn Meets the Lone Wolf's Live-and-Work Loft
programme.desc: Cody drops a slam dunk bid for a tiny backyard barn but getting it to the renovation lot takes one of the most radical house moves ever seen in Fort Worth. Suzi has to figure out how to turn 210 square feet of barn into a home.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Randy's Airy Atrium vs. the Snows' Raised Roof
programme.desc: The Snows and Randy go to two auctions in one day. After Randy snags the first house, he and the Snows devise a plan to join together. They end up with two separate builds and literally split a house between them.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Icing Man Cometh
programme.desc: Cake is dandy but let's face it, without frosting it's just sweet bread. With tools straight from his local hardware store, host Alton Brown builds a better butter cream and constructs a layer cake from the ground up.

programme.title: Good Eats: Puff the Magic Mallow
programme.desc: Alton Brown shares the sweet, sticky science behind homemade marshmallows.

programme.title: Good Eats: Puddin' Head Blues
programme.desc: An investigation into the origins and secrets of pudding.

programme.title: Good Eats: Three Chips for Sister Marsha
programme.desc: Alton reveals the secrets of baking the perfect cookie.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Hand-Held Eats

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Pies

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Coffee Break
programme.desc: The most unique sweets to suit your morning cup o' Joe. Abraco may be small in size, but its morning pastries are packed with big bold flavors like black sesame cardamom spiced cake, and saffron sugar babk.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Luscious Layers
programme.desc: Three unique sweet spots that deliver layers of incredible flavors and textures. Union Fare Bakery in New York City is flipping the switch on the classic croissant and baking up flavors like red velvet and birthday cake.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Sweet Treats in NYC
programme.desc: We're on the hunt for the best sweet treats New York City has to offer. Sweets by Chloe is a cute vegan bakeshop that's creating giant cookies and fudge cakes that are rich and moist, creamy and chocolatey.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mississippi Delta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic soul food of the Mississippi Delta. From fried catfish and hushpuppies to smothered oxtails and decadent mud pie, the Deep South's down-home dishes soothe the soul.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chiang Mai
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the most iconic foods of Chiang Mai, Thailand. From coconut curry soup to a signature sausage with pork and chile paste, fish roasted in banana leaves to minced pork salad, the northern city has a regional cuisine unlike any other.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Cakes On The Move
programme.desc: Karisha attempts to add electronics to a challenging christening cake, and Rosie's cake lights up the night with a neon fireworks display.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Island Replica Cake

programme.title: DuckTales: The Duck Knight Returns!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Coffee Quest/ Phoenix Rises
programme.desc: When Big City faces a coffee bean shortage, Cricket and Gloria’s boss, Ms. Cho, challenges them to retrieve one of a few remaining sacks of coffee; When the Greens' dog, Phoenix, runs away from home, the family sets out to find her.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Uncaged
programme.desc: Cricket and Tilly’s rebellious mother Nancy Green is fresh out of jail and setting up shop in the city.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Drop the Needle/ Really Gross Anatomy
programme.desc: Mavis agrees to teach Klaus to bat out if he shows her how to replace the needle on Aunt Lydia's gramophone. Dr. Gillman gets an education on medicine from Mavis and the crew, though no one really has much knowledge on the subject.

programme.title: Movie: The Adventures of Jurassic Pet
programme.desc: A teen works to save a dinosaur from experimentation.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Shorts: Outback at Ya!/ A Pete Scorned/Two Can't Play
DuckTales: The House of the Lucky Gander
programme.desc: Donald competes with his cousin Gladstone Gander to impress Louie at a mysterious resort in Macaw, while Scrooge tries to lure the kids away from the resort's endless distractions.

programme.title: DuckTales: Storkules in Duckburg!
programme.desc: Louie recruits Storkules for his professional monster extermination business, while Storkules faces his greatest challenge: being Donald’s roommate.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Primal Perry
programme.desc: When Perry comes face to face with an Australian platypus hunter who wants to destroy him, he must find a way to defeat this villainous foe.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sleepwalk Surprise/ Sci-Fi Pie Fly
programme.desc: Candace's plans to hang out with Jeremy are derailed after he becomes interested in playing a new game. Phineas and Ferbs create their own flying saucer to help solve a mystery.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mini-Maximum Trouble
programme.desc: When Fred runs into a string of bad luck, Megan reveals to Hiro that she's trying to uncover the true identities of Big Hero 6 for her school's newspaper.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hardlight
programme.desc: Now fugitives, Big Hero 6 lay low as the SFPD searches for them. However, new villain Hardlight shows up hoping to challenge Big Hero 6 to a real-life videogame duel.

programme.title: Amphibia: Cursed!/ Fiddle Me This
programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Summerween
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel are excited to join in on the fun, but when Wendy casually mentions that trick-or-treating is for kids, Dipper's whole outlook on the evening changes. Dipper accidentally insults a monster who makes him fill his candy quota or be eaten.

programme.title: Star Wars Resistance: The Relic Raiders
programme.desc: When Kaz and the team arrive on a mysterious planet to buy supplies, they find the outpost has been abandoned and a secret Sith Temple has been raised.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Something Fluffy
programme.desc: When mysterious but adorable creatures called Mayoi suddenly appear in San Fransokyo, Hiro is convinced that they’re part of some nefarious plot by Liv Amara.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Marki-Fired!
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays: Slime and Pirates!
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: McMystery at McDuck McManor
programme.desc: When Scrooge unexpectedly disappears during his birthday party, Huey, Dewey and Louie find themselves hosting a mystery party where everyone is a suspect.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Most Dangerous Game...Night!
programme.desc: When Louie’s quiet family game night goes wrong, the family deals with shrink rays, a secret civilization and an unhealthy competition.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Take Flight! Aerial Showdown!
programme.desc: Aiger is more determined than ever to battle Valt. But even though his bond with Turbo Achilles has gotten stronger, Aiger realizes he has a long way to go if he hopes to win.

programme.title: Inazuma Eleven Ares: Elliot Ember on Fire
Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Battling Besties!
programme.desc: As the Alola Pokémon League marches on, friends and rivals alike give it their all!

programme.title: DuckTales: Last Christmas!
programme.desc: Scrooge celebrates Christmas with his time-traveling ghost buddies while time-lost Dewey teams with Young Donald to find his mom on Christmas.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Fright of Hand/ Dude Where's My Garlic?
programme.desc: Mavis goes a bit too far in wanting to show Aunt Lydia she can throw a proper party.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Great Eggspectations/ Hotel Pennsylvania
programme.desc: Mavis tries to prove she can care for a living creature by rescuing a 'bad egg.' The kids try to watch the last episode of their favourite show, Hotel Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar

programme.title: Movie: Bohemian Rhapsody
programme.desc: Singer and songwriter Freddie Mercury helps form the band Queen, but at the same time that his flamboyant stage presence and powerful vocals lead the group to new levels of stardom his tumultuous personal life begins to spiral out of control.

programme.title: Movie: Cold Pursuit
programme.desc: A family man and snowplow driver is named his small town's citizen of the year for his lifetime of service to the snowy community, but his euphoria is shattered when his son turns up dead, transforming the father into a killer out for revenge.

programme.title: Movie: Us
programme.desc: Evil doppelgangers terrorize a vacationing family.

programme.desc: Comedian Lil Rel Howery performs in a one-hour special on HBO.

programme.title: A Black Lady Sketch Show
programme.desc: A 30-minute sketch comedy series written by and starring Robin Thede.

programme.title: Watchmen: Little Fear of Lightning
programme.desc: The origin story of Looking Glass is at last revealed, as is the truth behind the greatest hoax in American history. Far away, the Smartest Man in the World plots a daring escape.

programme.title: Lil Rel Howery: Live in Crenshaw
programme.desc: Comedian Lil Rel Howery performs in a one-hour special on HBO.

programme.title: Lil Rel Howery: Live in Crenshaw

programme.title: Movie: Isn't It Romantic
programme.desc: After woman who has spent her whole life feeling cynical about love and romance suffers a nasty hit to the head, she wakes up to find herself living in a romantic comedy, complete with new friends and a new love interest vying for her attention.

programme.title: Movie: First Man
programme.desc: In the lead-up to his historic walk on the moon's surface, astronaut Neil Armstrong struggles with the magnitude and dangers of the mission, while his wife finds it difficult to support his trip that is likely to cost their children their father.

programme.title: Movie: Signs
programme.desc: A family living on a farm in Pennsylvania finds mysterious crop circles in their fields, which suggest something more frightening to come.

programme.title: Movie: Fahrenheit 451
programme.desc: In a dystopian future where books are banned and ordered destroyed, firemen are tasked with this duty. A fireman chooses to rebel against society after a life-changing meeting with a young girl.

programme.title: Movie: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Having returned from fighting in the Crusades, Robin Hood turns to thievery as a way of rebelling against the tyrannical Sheriff of Nottingham. With the help of his Merry Men, he comes up with a daring plan to empty the Sheriff's own treasury.

programme.title: Ernie & Joe: Crisis Cops
programme.desc: Ernie Steven and Joe Smarro are putting compassionate policing practices into action. This film chronicles their daily encounters with people in crisis, showing how an innovative approach to policing is having a dramatic effect.

programme.title: Movie: King Arthur
programme.desc: A demystified version of the legend of King Arthur and the Knights of the Round Table.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Signed, Sealed, and Delivered

programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace and it appears that she was either kidnapped or murdered. Police concern heightens when they learn that two other women have vanished under similar circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: When a banker's wife is kidnapped, officers scour the bank, and records for clues. They soon realize how much evidence can be found around a normal office.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: When You Die
programme.desc: What really happens when we die? For thousands of years, the dreams and visions of the dying have captivated cultures. But what are they and what causes them? And are they real?

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Larry Melton's Chance of a Lifetime

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Otto's Surprise

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier Exposed: Moving Mountains
programme.desc: With insider facts and Frontier Extras: The Kilchers fire things up when they use explosives to expand a road on the homestead. Meanwhile, Atz Sr. and Bonnie head out into the backcountry to salvage some basic needs.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Turkey With a Side of Hay
programme.desc: In the midst of Thanksgiving preparations, a baby seal needs help getting back to its family in time for dinner. Later, Eivin and August engineer a hay baler that will literally take a load off their backs.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Piney Woods Place
programme.desc: Cat Taylor constructs a remote sanctuary for her and her husband in the woods of Northwest Texas. The two-story home is made from sand, clay and straw.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bottle Island
programme.desc: John Beal is ready to leave the city behind and embrace a life off the grid in Isla Mujeres, Mexico. He hires Richart Sowa and his son Eden to build an eco-friendly private floating island made from recycled plastic bottles.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Turkey With a Side of Hay

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Thanksgiving
